title: What Should An AI Device Look Like? — With Alex Himel
summary: Alex Himel, Meta's VP of Wearables, discusses the future of AI-enabled glasses as a potential major computing platform. The conversation covers how AI assistants could integrate into daily activities, competitive dynamics with OpenAI, Google, Apple, and Amazon, and privacy concerns around facial recognition on wearable devices.
writeup: Alex Kantrowitz interviews Alex Himel, Meta's VP of Wearables, on AI-enabled glasses as a potential major computing platform. The discussion covers how AI assistants could integrate into daily activities, the competitive dynamics with OpenAI, Google, Apple, and Amazon, and privacy concerns around facial recognition on wearable devices. Key concepts include on-device AI, conversational AI, and AI agents.
